data.title: Volato Group Stock Is Soaring Tuesday: What's Driving The Action?
data.description: Volato Group Inc (AMEX:SOAR) shares are soaring Tuesday after the company unveiled a patent-pending Bitcoin (CRYPTO:BTC) mining method that involves aircraft.

data.title: Nauticus Robotics Talks 2025 Projects After Gulf Of Mexico Win
data.description: Nauticus Robotics, Inc. (KITT) shares surge premarket after successfully completing subsea inspection project in Gulf of Mexico for major oil and gas company. Autonomous technology reduces emissions. Potential projects for 2025 discussed.

data.title: Ondo Finance, Ethereum's BlackRock-Backed Tokenization Crypto, Surges 38%: Why Is ONDO Going Up?
data.description: Ondo Finance (CRYPTO: ONDO), a tokenization-themed cryptocurrency with ties to BlackRock, has surged over 35% in the last 24 hours.

data.title: Space-Based Internet Gets A Boost: AST SpaceMobile And Cadence Collaborate On High-Bandwidth Satellite Chip
data.description: AST SpaceMobile and Cadence collaborate to advance global connectivity by developing a custom low-power chip for space-based broadband services.
